member.summary: Represents the company-wide policy governing voluntary deductions when net pay is insufficient.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.NegativeNetPayPolicy.BlockDeduction
member.summary: Block deduction: Roll back calculation or abort run if net pay drops below zero.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.NegativeNetPayPolicy.PartialDeduction
member.summary: Partial deduction: Scale down voluntary deduction to make net pay exactly zero, audit-logging warning flags.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.NegativeNetPayPolicy.AllowNegativeNetPay
member.summary: Allow negative net pay: Deduct the full amount, allowing net pay to go negative (not standard for pilot, but supported by configuration).

member.summary: Domain boundary policy to validate password strength and blacklist checks.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PasswordPolicy.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates password strength against the pilot complexity criteria: - Minimum 12 characters. - At least one lowercase letter. - At least one uppercase letter. - At least one digit. - Must not be in the common password blacklist.
member.exception: Thrown if validation rules are violated.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent
member.summary:
Represents a configurable payroll component (earnings, deduction, allowance, benefit, or statutory item) that is applied during payroll calculation.
Maps to the company.PayrollComponents table as defined in Database.md §5.6.
Business rules enforced by this entity:
System components (PAYE, FNPF) cannot be deleted or deactivated.
A Formula component must have a non-empty Formula expression.
A Fixed or Percentage component must have a positive CalculationValue.
ComponentCode is always stored in uppercase, max 20 characters.
DisplayOrder must be non-negative.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.CompanyId
member.summary: Foreign key to company.Companies. Every component belongs to exactly one company.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.ComponentCode
member.summary: Short alphanumeric code uniquely identifying this component within the company (e.g., "BASIC", "HRA", "PAYE"). Always uppercase. Max 20 characters.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown on payslips and reports (e.g., "Housing Allowance"). Max 200 characters.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.ComponentType
member.summary: Classifies the component as an Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, or Statutory item.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Determines how the component amount is computed during payroll calculation.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.CalculationValue
member.summary: The dollar amount (for ) or percentage (for ). Null for Formula and Manual methods.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Formula
member.summary: For components — the expression string. Supported variables: {GrossPay}, {AnnualSalary}, {HoursWorked}, {DailyRate}, {OvertimeHours}. Null for all other calculation methods.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsSystemComponent
member.summary: When true, this component is a built-in system component (PAYE, FNPF) that cannot be deleted or deactivated.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsTaxable
member.summary: When true, this component's value is included in the taxable income used for PAYE calculation.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsFnpfApplicable
member.summary: When true, this component's value is included in the FNPF-applicable gross used to calculate employee and employer FNPF contributions.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Controls the order in which this component appears on payslips and reports. Lower numbers appear first. Must be non-negative.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Description
member.summary: Optional long-form description explaining the purpose or calculation logic. Max 500 characters.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsActive
member.summary: When false, this component is excluded from all payroll calculations. System components cannot be set to inactive.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Status
member.summary: Gets the current lifecycle status of the component.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Rules
member.summary: Gets the collection of executable rules associated with this component.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Dependencies
member.summary: Gets the dependencies for this payroll component.
Creates and validates a new instance.
member.param: Unique code within the company (max 20 chars, uppercase).
Amount or percentage; required for Fixed and Percentage methods.
Expression string; required for Formula method.
Whether this component is included in taxable income.
Whether this component is included in FNPF-applicable gross.
Reserved for seed data; system components cannot be modified.
member.exception: Thrown when business rules are violated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Update(System.String,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the component's name, calculation method, tax flags, and display order. System components have restricted editing — only name and display order can change.
member.param: Updated calculation method (restricted for system components).
member.exception: Thrown when a system component's restricted fields are changed.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Activate
member.summary: Activates this component so it is included in payroll calculations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates this component so it is excluded from future payroll calculations.
member.exception: Thrown if this is a system component — system components cannot be deactivated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.SoftDelete(System.String)
member.summary: Logically deletes this component. Prevents use in future payroll runs.
member.exception: Thrown if this is a system component.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Draft
member.summary: Sets this component status to Draft.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Duplicate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of this component with a new code, name, and no system flag. Used for the "Duplicate" feature in the UI.
member.param: The code for the duplicated component.
The name for the duplicated component.
member.returns: A new unsaved with the same settings.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Validate
member.summary: Evaluates whether this component has a valid configuration for the given calculation method. Returns a list of validation error messages.

member.summary: Sets and cross-validates CalculationValue and Formula based on the chosen method.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy
member.summary: Company-level policy governing how leave balances are accrued. Maps to leave.LeaveAccrualPolicies. Supports both annual-grant and periodic-accrual models.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the company this policy belongs to (multi-tenant isolation).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.LeaveTypeId
member.summary: Gets the leave type this accrual policy applies to.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.LeaveType
member.summary: Navigation property to the associated leave type.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.PolicyName
member.summary: Gets the descriptive name of this policy.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.AccrualMethod
member.summary:
Gets the accrual method:
AnnualGrantFull entitlement granted at start of year.
PeriodicAccrualLeave accrues each pay period.
DailyAccrualLeave accrues daily (e.g., 0.03846 days/working day).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.AccrualRatePerDay
member.summary: Gets the accrual rate per working day. Per PayrollRules.md §10.1: 10 days / 260 working days = 0.03846 days/day. Only used when AccrualMethod is DailyAccrual or PeriodicAccrual.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.MaxCarryOverDays
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of days that can be carried over at year end. Null means unlimited carry-over (subject to leave type configuration).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.IsActive
member.summary: Gets whether the policy is currently active.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.EffectiveFrom
member.summary: Gets the date from which this policy is effective.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.EffectiveTo
member.summary: Gets the optional expiry date for this policy.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.Create(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Factory method to create a new leave accrual policy.
member.param: Accrual rate per working day (0 for AnnualGrant).
Optional end date for this policy.
member.exception: Thrown when business rules are violated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveAccrualPolicy.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates this accrual policy.
member.exception: Thrown if deleted or already inactive.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance
member.summary: Tracks an employee's leave balance for a specific leave type in a given fiscal year. Maps to employee.EmployeeLeaveBalances. All balance mutations are controlled through domain methods to enforce business invariants.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the company this balance belongs to (multi-tenant isolation).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.EmployeeId
member.summary: Gets the employee who owns this leave balance.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.LeaveTypeId
member.summary: Gets the leave type this balance is for.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.LeaveType
member.summary: Navigation property to the associated leave type.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.FiscalYear
member.summary: Gets the fiscal year this balance applies to (e.g., 2026).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Entitlement
member.summary: Gets the full annual entitlement in working days as configured on the leave type.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Accrued
member.summary: Gets the total days accrued to date (may differ from entitlement for mid-year starters).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.CarriedForward
member.summary: Gets the total days carried forward from the previous period.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Taken
member.summary: Gets the total leave days already taken (from approved requests in payroll).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Pending
member.summary: Gets the total leave days in approved pending requests not yet processed by payroll.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Available
member.summary: Gets the remaining available balance: Accrued + CarriedForward − Taken − Pending.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.ClosingBalance
member.summary: Gets the closing balance at the end of the period (set during period close).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Initialise(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Factory method to initialise a new leave balance for an employee for a fiscal year.
member.param: Days brought forward from previous period.
member.returns: A new with zero taken/pending amounts.
member.exception: Thrown when inputs violate business rules.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Accrue(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Accrues a number of days to this balance (used for pro-rata or periodic accrual).
member.exception: Thrown when days is non-positive.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Reserve(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Reserves (holds) days as pending when a leave request is approved but not yet in payroll.
member.exception: Thrown when insufficient balance or invalid days.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Release(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Releases previously reserved (pending) days back to available balance. Called when a leave request is cancelled after approval.
member.exception: Thrown when releasing more than is pending.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.ProcessPayroll(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Processes payroll consumption of leave: moves reserved days from pending to taken.
member.exception: Thrown when days exceed pending or are invalid.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.Adjust(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Applies a manual adjustment to the balance (e.g., correction, carry-forward override).
member.param: Positive to add, negative to subtract.
member.exception: Thrown when the adjustment would make accrued negative or reason is empty.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveBalance.ClosePeriod
member.summary: Closes the period: computes and stores the closing balance. Should be called at fiscal year end before carry-forward processing.

member.summary: Domain events raised by this aggregate for out-of-process consumers.

member.summary: Gets the domain events raised by this aggregate (read-only projection).

member.summary: Clears accumulated domain events (called after publishing).

member.summary: Factory method to submit a new leave request. Business rule: Start date must not exceed end date. Business rule: Total days must be positive. Business rule: End date must not be in the past.
member.param: Working days count (caller computes, accounting for weekends/holidays).
Whether a certificate is required per leave type config.
member.exception: Thrown when business rules are violated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveRequest.Approve(System.String)
member.summary: Approves the leave request. Business rule: Only requests can be approved.
member.exception: Thrown if status transition is invalid.

member.summary: Rejects the leave request. Business rule: Only requests can be rejected.
member.exception: Thrown if status transition is invalid or reason is empty.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Leave.LeaveRequest.Cancel(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Cancels the leave request. Business rule: Only or requests can be cancelled.
member.param: Username of the person performing the cancellation.
member.exception: Thrown if status transition is invalid.

member.summary: Marks the medical certificate as provided. Business rule: Only applies when is true.
member.exception: Thrown if no certificate is required for this request.

member.summary: Factory method to construct a new RetroactiveAdjustment.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.RetroactiveAdjustment.MarkAsApplied(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks the adjustment as applied in the specified payroll run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.RetroactiveAdjustment.RevertApplication
member.summary: Unapplies/reverts the applied status (e.g. during a run reset or reversal).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule
member.summary: Domain model representing a dynamic, authority-based statutory rule (e.g. FNPF rates or PAYE brackets). Helps avoid recompilation when legislation parameters change.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.Authority
member.summary: Gets the statutory authority governing this rule (e.g., "FRCS", "FNPF").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.RuleCode
member.summary: Gets the unique code key identifying this configuration parameter (e.g., "FNPF_EE_RATE").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.RuleValue
member.summary: Gets the configuration value (could represent raw values, percentages, or serialized range structures).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.Description
member.summary: Gets the description explaining what this rule configures.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.EffectiveFrom
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this rule configuration becomes active.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.EffectiveTo
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this rule configuration ceases to be active (optional).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.IsActive
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this rule is currently active.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.Create(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Factory method to construct a new StatutoryRule.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates the statutory rule.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.StatutoryRule.Activate
member.summary: Activates the statutory rule.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ApprovalRole
member.summary: Defines the specific verification role classifications for approvers in the approval engine.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ApprovalRole.PayrollOfficer
member.summary: Data entry level administrator handling preliminary runs updates.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ApprovalRole.PayrollSupervisor
member.summary: Supervisor managing runs verification and locking operations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ApprovalRole.FinanceManager
member.summary: Finance director signing off bank files disbursements.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ApprovalRole.HRManager
member.summary: HR manager verifying leave, promotions, and contracts details.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ApprovalRole.Administrator
member.summary: System level administrator holding global permission scopes.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType
member.summary: Defines the specific business purpose and classification of a company bank account.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.Operating
member.summary: Account used for general business operations and payments.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.Payroll
member.summary: Account dedicated exclusively for employee salary disbursements.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.Tax
member.summary: Account held for withholding tax and PAYE obligations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.FNPF
member.summary: Account held for statutory FNPF contributions remittance.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.Savings
member.summary: General savings account holding company surplus funds.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.Trust
member.summary: Account held under fiduciary trust conditions.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.BankAccountType.Custom
member.summary: Custom account type for specialised payment allocations.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Defines how the value of a payroll component is determined during payroll calculation. Corresponds to the CalculationMethod column in company.PayrollComponents.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Fixed
member.summary: A fixed monetary amount applied every pay period, regardless of the employee's base pay (e.g., $500 Housing Allowance per month). The CalculationValue column holds the dollar amount.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Percentage
member.summary: A percentage of the relevant base (typically gross pay or FNPF-applicable gross). The CalculationValue column holds the percentage (e.g., 8.0 for 8%).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Formula
member.summary: A user-defined formula expression evaluated at runtime. Supported variables: {GrossPay}, {AnnualSalary}, {HoursWorked}, {DailyRate}, {OvertimeHours}. The Formula column holds the expression text.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Manual
member.summary: The value is entered manually per employee, per pay period during data entry. No default calculation is applied. Used for irregular payments such as one-off bonuses or ad-hoc allowances.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalendarType
member.summary: Defines the structure type of a fiscal calendar.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalendarType.Weekly
member.summary: Calendar consisting of 52 or 53 weekly pay periods.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalendarType.Fortnightly
member.summary: Calendar consisting of 26 or 27 fortnightly pay periods.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalendarType.Monthly
member.summary: Standard calendar consisting of 12 monthly periods.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalendarType.Custom
member.summary: Custom calendar structure for non-standard fiscal schedules.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceBatchStatus
member.summary: Status of a compliance batch tracking lifecycle phases.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceBatchStatus.Active
member.summary: Batch is active and being worked on.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceBatchStatus.Submitted
member.summary: Batch has been submitted to external statutory systems.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceBatchStatus.Archived
member.summary: Batch has been archived for long-term historical storage.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus
member.summary: Execution states of asynchronous compliance processing background jobs.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus.Pending
member.summary: Job is scheduled and awaiting thread activation.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus.Running
member.summary: Job is currently processing on an active thread.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus.Completed
member.summary: Job finished successfully.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus.Failed
member.summary: Job failed with an exception.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus.Retrying
member.summary: Job failed and is waiting to retry.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceJobStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Job was explicitly cancelled by an administrator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CompliancePeriodStatus
member.summary: Status of a compliance reporting period (e.g. dynamic monthly cycle).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CompliancePeriodStatus.Open
member.summary: Period is open for transactions and modifications.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CompliancePeriodStatus.Locked
member.summary: Period is locked for review and verification; no further entries permitted.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CompliancePeriodStatus.Closed
member.summary: Period is finalized and closed; historical ledger frozen.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceReconciliationStatus
member.summary: States for audit reconciliation variances.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceReconciliationStatus.Balanced
member.summary: Ledger amounts and compliance export amounts reconcile perfectly.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceReconciliationStatus.Warning
member.summary: Variance identified within tolerable warning limits.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceReconciliationStatus.Critical
member.summary: Critical variance identified requiring system override or rollback.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus
member.summary: Execution and submission phases of a compliance file or portal submission.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Draft
member.summary: Submission is a draft.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Validated
member.summary: Submission has passed the rules engine validation.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Generated
member.summary: Submission files have been compiled.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Submitted
member.summary: Submission has been successfully filed with the authority.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Amended
member.summary: Submission represents an amendment of a previous filing.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Superseded
member.summary: Submission has been superseded by a newer amendment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Archived
member.summary: Submission data has been archived.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceSubmissionStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Submission was cancelled or discarded.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceValidatorSeverity
member.summary: Severity level of issues caught by compliance validators.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceValidatorSeverity.Info
member.summary: Informational note; does not restrict submission processing.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceValidatorSeverity.Warning
member.summary: Warning check; should be reviewed but can be submitted.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComplianceValidatorSeverity.Error
member.summary: Error block; must be corrected before file generation or submission is permitted.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle status of a payroll component or rule.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentStatus.Draft
member.summary: Component is in draft and not used in calculations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentStatus.Active
member.summary: Component is active and included in calculations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentStatus.Inactive
member.summary: Component is inactive and excluded from calculations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentStatus.Archived
member.summary: Component is archived for historical auditing and read-only.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType
member.summary: Defines the nature of a payroll component — whether it adds to or subtracts from an employee's gross pay, and how it is treated for tax and FNPF purposes.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Earning
member.summary: A monetary payment that forms part of gross earnings (e.g., Basic Salary, Overtime Pay). Typically taxable and FNPF-applicable unless specifically excluded.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Deduction
member.summary: A deduction subtracted from gross pay to arrive at net pay (e.g., Loan Repayment, Union Fees, Health Insurance). Not taxable (deductions reduce take-home, not tax base — PAYE is separate).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Allowance
member.summary: An additional payment on top of base salary, commonly for living expenses (e.g., Housing Allowance, Transport Allowance, Meal Allowance). Taxability and FNPF applicability are component-specific per FRCS rules.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Benefit
member.summary: A non-cash or in-kind benefit provided to an employee (e.g., Vehicle Benefit, Health Insurance Employer Contribution). May or may not be taxable depending on FRCS treatment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Statutory
member.summary: A legislatively mandated deduction or contribution that cannot be disabled (e.g., PAYE Tax, FNPF Employee Contribution, FNPF Employer Contribution). System components cannot be deleted or deactivated.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Overtime
member.summary: Overtime pay component, calculated based on overtime hours and multiplier rates. Adds to gross earnings and is typically taxable and FNPF-applicable.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.LoanRepayment
member.summary: A deduction for staff loan repayments, auto-calculated from active loan schedules. Reduces take-home pay; not taxable.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.LeaveDeduction
member.summary: A deduction representing the monetary value of leave days taken (e.g., leave without pay). Reduces gross pay when leave is unpaid or exceeds entitlements.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType
member.summary: Defines the type of employment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Permanent
member.summary: Permanent employee.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Contract
member.summary: Contractual employee with fixed duration.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Casual
member.summary: Casual hourly paid employee.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Temporary
member.summary: Temporary short-term employee.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Apprentice
member.summary: Apprentice/trainee employee.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle status states of a wizard setup or background orchestrator execution run.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.Pending
member.summary: The execution task is queued or waiting to begin.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.Running
member.summary: The execution task is currently active and processing.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.Completed
member.summary: The execution task completed successfully and committed change records.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.Failed
member.summary: The execution task failed and logged error reports.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.RolledBack
member.summary: The execution transaction was aborted and fully rolled back to prevent data corruption.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.Retrying
member.summary: The execution task failed and is retrying connection attempts.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ExecutionStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: The execution task was manually canceled by the administrator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.FrequencyCode
member.summary: Defines the schedule codes for payroll frequency runs.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.FrequencyCode.Weekly
member.summary: Weekly pay frequency. 52 pay periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.FrequencyCode.Fortnightly
member.summary: Fortnightly pay frequency. 26 pay periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.FrequencyCode.BiMonthly
member.summary: Bi-monthly pay frequency. 24 pay periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.FrequencyCode.Monthly
member.summary: Monthly pay frequency. 12 pay periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.FrequencyCode.Custom
member.summary: Custom pay frequency schedule.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory
member.summary: Categories of leave available to employees as defined in PayrollRules.md §10. Maps directly to company.LeaveTypes.Category column.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.AnnualLeave
member.summary: Annual leave entitlement (minimum 10 working days/year).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.SickLeave
member.summary: Sick leave entitlement (10 days/year).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.MaternityLeave
member.summary: Maternity leave (84 days paid for primary carer).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.PaternityLeave
member.summary: Paternity leave (5 days paid).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.BereavementLeave
member.summary: Bereavement leave (3 days paid for immediate family).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.JuryDuty
member.summary: Jury duty (full pay).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.UnpaidLeave
member.summary: Unpaid leave — no pay during period.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveCategory.Other
member.summary: Any other leave type not covered by standard categories.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveStatus
member.summary: Status values for a lifecycle. Models the approval state machine enforced by the domain aggregate.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveStatus.Pending
member.summary: Leave request submitted by employee, awaiting manager decision.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveStatus.Approved
member.summary: Leave request approved by authorised manager.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveStatus.Rejected
member.summary: Leave request rejected by manager.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LeaveStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Leave request cancelled by the employee or an admin.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LoanStatus
member.summary: Status of an employee staff loan.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LoanStatus.Active
member.summary: Loan is active and deductions are applied.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LoanStatus.FullyPaid
member.summary: Loan has been fully repaid.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LoanStatus.Suspended
member.summary: Loan deductions are suspended temporarily.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.LoanStatus.WrittenOff
member.summary: Loan has been cancelled or written off.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel
member.summary: Active channels supported by the notification delivery dispatch engine.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel.Email
member.summary: Dispatch via SMTP email gateway.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel.Desktop
member.summary: Display on internal WPF system notifications HUD.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel.SMS
member.summary: Dispatch via SMS telecom gateway.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel.Webhook
member.summary: Push via generic Webhook endpoint.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel.Teams
member.summary: Push alert message to Microsoft Teams channel.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.NotificationChannel.Slack
member.summary: Push alert message to Slack channel.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType
member.summary: Defines the payment method types supported by the payroll system.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.Cash
member.summary: Cash payment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.Cheque
member.summary: Cheque payment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.BankTransfer
member.summary: Direct bank transfer (EFT).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.MobileTransfer
member.summary: Mobile transfer (M-PAiSA, MyCash).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollAdjustmentType
member.summary: Defines categories for staging payroll adjustments.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequencyType
member.summary: Defines the payroll frequency — how often employees in a pay group are paid. Used to determine the number of pay periods per year and therefore the annualisation factor in PAYE calculations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequencyType.Weekly
member.summary: Paid every 7 days. 52 periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequencyType.Fortnightly
member.summary: Paid every 14 days. 26 periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequencyType.BiMonthly
member.summary: Paid twice per month (semi-monthly), typically on the 15th and last day. 24 periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequencyType.Monthly
member.summary: Paid once per calendar month. 12 periods per year.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle status of a payroll period.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.Open
member.summary: Period is open for data entry and staging adjustments.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.CalculationInProgress
member.summary: Payroll calculations are currently running for this period.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.Calculated
member.summary: Payroll calculations have completed but not yet posted.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.Posted
member.summary: Payroll calculations have been finalized and posted to ledger.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.Closed
member.summary: Period has been closed, preventing further changes.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.Locked
member.summary: Period is locked for compliance/audit, immutable.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollPeriodStatus.Archived
member.summary: Period is archived, read-only and backed up.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle status of a payroll run.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Draft
member.summary: Run created, not yet calculated.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Validating
member.summary: Validation is in progress before calculation.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Calculating
member.summary: Calculation is actively in progress. Acts as a lock.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Calculated
member.summary: Calculated successfully, pending manager review.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Approved
member.summary: Approved by an authorized manager, ready for posting.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Posted
member.summary: Posted to general ledger. Financial corrections are active.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.BankExported
member.summary: Bank file has been exported.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.FrcsExported
member.summary: FRCS file has been exported.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.FnpfExported
member.summary: FNPF file has been exported.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.EvidencePackGenerated
member.summary: Evidence pack has been generated and cryptographically signed.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Locked
member.summary: Run is closed and locked for auditing purposes.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Archived
member.summary: Run is archived and read-only.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Reversed
member.summary: Financial correction state applied post-posting.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollValidationSeverity
member.summary: Severity level of a payroll validation message or exception.

member.summary: Trigger action every day.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.SchedulerInterval.Weekly

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.SeedCategory.Reports

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.VoluntaryDeductionPolicy
member.summary: Policy options for handling voluntary deductions when an employee's net pay is insufficient.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.VoluntaryDeductionPolicy.BlockPayroll
member.summary: Policy A: Block payroll run calculation if net pay is negative after voluntary deductions. Throws a PayrollException.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.VoluntaryDeductionPolicy.CarryForwardRemainder
member.summary: Policy B: Apply voluntary deductions partially and carry forward the remainder.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.VoluntaryDeductionPolicy.PartialDeductionWithAuditFlag
member.summary: Policy C: Apply voluntary deductions partially and raise an audit flag/warning.
